title: Domain Api Actor
description: Value object representing an authenticated API principal when server auth is enabled (future types). v1 uses `disabled` and relies on core `ActorResolver` instead.
context: Value object representing an authenticated API principal when server auth is enabled (future types). v1 uses `disabled` and relies on core `ActorResolver` instead.

rules: `ApiActor` MUST include non-empty `id` and `name` strings and a string `email` (MAY be empty when the provider has no email). It MAY include `roles: string[]` for authorization hints in future types.

rules.requirement: ApiActor is immutable on the request
rules: Once attached to request context, `ApiActor` MUST NOT be mutated by handlers or middleware.

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.name: ApiActor requires id and name
when: verifier constructs ApiActor for a successful auth
then: id and name are non-empty strings
AND email is a string (may be empty)

scenarios.name: Invalid empty id is rejected at construction
when: verifier attempts to build ApiActor with empty id
then: AND request does not reach kernel

scenarios.requirement: ApiActor is immutable on the request
scenarios.name: Handlers cannot mutate ApiActor on context
when: handler tries to change actor.email after attach
then: mutation does not affect stored context

scenarios.requirement: ApiActor is immutable on the request
scenarios.name: Middleware attach is single assignment
then: ApiActor is set once on the context object
AND later middleware reads the same values

scenarios.requirement: ApiActor is immutable on the request
scenarios.name: Frozen actor survives presenter chain
then: actor fields are unchanged at response time
